heroDescription: Your journey to better productivity starts here. Sign in to continue building amazing products.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

signUp.title: Create Account
signUp.invitationNotice: Create your account below to accept your invitation.
signUp.agreementText: By creating an account, you agree to our <0>Terms of Service</0>

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: We've sent a password reset link to
forgotPassword.checkEmailInstructions: Click the link in the email to reset your password. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You will be redirected to sign in.
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been verified successfully. You will be redirected to sign in.
verifyEmail.invalidTokenDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
